rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.
rows.output: {"name":"Turn on the TV when presence is detected","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence == true) { (#Television).switch_on(); }"}

rows.command_eng: When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.
rows.output: {"name":"When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#SoundSensor).soundsensor_sound > 50) { (#Speaker).speaker_stop(); }"}

rows.command_eng: When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.
rows.output: {"name":"Turn on the dehumidifier when it rains","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#WeatherProvider).weatherprovider_rain == true) { (#Dehumidifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode(\"dehumidifying\") }"}

rows.command_eng: When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.
rows.output: {"name":"When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LightSensor).lightsensor_brightness < 100) { (#Light).switch_on(); }"}
